topicDefinition.oneLiner: Create high-converting marketing videos with AI. Perfect for ads, product demos, and brand storytelling.
boundaries: Must offer brand governance, custom color/font support, or high-fidelity commercial outputs.
Must be suitable for external-facing marketing assets (B2B demos, B2C social ads).
Excludes low-quality, heavily watermarked tools unsuitable for professional brand reputation.

howToChoose.title: Evaluate Brand Kit Governance
howToChoose.desc: For marketing teams, the tool must enforce brand consistency across team members by locking down custom fonts, colors, and logos.

howToChoose.title: Check Multilingual Localization
howToChoose.desc: If running global ad campaigns, tools with native 1-click translation and voice dubbing (like HeyGen) save thousands in local agency fees.

howToChoose.title: Assess Automation Capabilities
howToChoose.desc: Look for tools that allow you to generate dozens of personalized video variants for A/B testing from a single template (e.g., Abyssale).

sources.title: The 9 Best AI Video Tools for Marketers in 2026
sources.excerpt: A deep dive comparing AI video editors, generative models, and automation tools for marketing teams.

sections.heading: Automation at Scale
sections.content: Abyssale produces hundreds of video variants from one template.

sections.heading: Generative Video
sections.content: HeyGen provides AI avatars with multilingual support and personalization at scale.

toolMentions.bestFor: Producing multiple video variants at scale for A/B testing
keyClaims: Produces hundreds of video variants from one template
proofSnippets: Abyssale: Produces hundreds of video variants from one template

keyClaims: AI avatars with multilingual support and personalization at scale
proofSnippets: HeyGen: AI avatars with multilingual support and personalization at scale

notes: Highly reputable source categorizing marketing tools into Editing, Generative, and Automation.

sources.title: Ultimate Guide – The Best AI Marketing Video Generators of 2026
sources.excerpt: An evaluation of high-fidelity cinematic tools for brand storytelling.

sections.heading: Generative Video
sections.content: Runway Gen-4 provides cinematic precision with professional controls like color grading. Mootion creates complete videos from single prompts, generating 3-minute videos in under 2 minutes.

keyClaims: Cinematic precision with professional controls like color grading
proofSnippets: Runway Gen-4: Cinematic precision with professional controls like color grading

toolMentions.bestFor: Rapid full-length video generation from text
watermarkRules: Watermark-free available on Standard plan ($15/mo) and above
exportRules: Supports multiple output formats for mainstream platforms
limitations: Free plan limited to 16 scenes/project max
proofSnippets: Mootion: Complete videos from single prompts; generates 3-minute videos in under 2 minutes
Free plan limited to 16 scenes/project max, 7 visual styles, limited voiceovers, 1080p, 1GB asset storage

notes: Focuses on narrative and ad creative workflows.

sources.title: HeyGen Official API Limits and Costs
sources.excerpt: Official constraints and pricing logic for HeyGen marketing automation via API.

sections.heading: API Costs (Pay-As-You-Go)
sections.content: Video Agent: $0.0333/sec. Public Avatar III: $0.0167/sec; Avatar IV: $0.1/sec. Video Translation (Precision Mode): $0.1/sec.

sections.heading: Usage Limits
sections.content: Output Video: Maximum 50 video scenes per video. Dimensions between 128 and 4,096 pixels.

pricingClaims: Pay-As-You-Go: $0.1/sec for Avatar IV or Precision Translation
limitations: Maximum 50 video scenes per generated video
Input text must be under 5,000 characters
Digital Twin audio input capped at 10 minutes (600 seconds)
proofSnippets: Output Video: Maximum 50 video scenes per video

notes: Provides official, exact constraints for developers building marketing automation.
